sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this NES platformer

special_mechanics.name: Flight/Swimming
special_mechanics.description: A button pressed repeatedly enables Felix to fly or swim depending on context

special_mechanics.name: Magic Attack System
special_mechanics.description: B button executes attacks that vary based on current magic level; magic power decreases when hit by enemies

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No specific physics parameters documented in available sources. Game described as having 'simple game mechanics.' Movement speeds, gravity values, and jump physics are not quantified in any documentation reviewed. This is a straightforward NES platformer with basic controls and level design.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Felix the Cat (NES)
